_comment: PRODUCTION shard cohort for peerit.site. These are the same public HiveRelays used for outbox gossip, now also exposing the /api/v1/shard surface. This file contains ONLY base URLs and Ed25519 pubkeys (no apiKeys). The dealer write path uses ~/.hiverelay-shard-cohort/roster.json for operator secrets. AT LEAST 3 RELAYS ARE REQUIRED for k-of-n dispersal; the current file intentionally lists 2 production URLs plus placeholders. EMPTY PUBKEYS ARE INTENTIONAL PLACEHOLDERS: add a third relay (ideally an independent operator), run deploy/shard-cohort/extract-pubkey.mjs on each host, and paste the real 64-hex publicKey values here before shipping. build-web.mjs will refuse to ship a release with missing/invalid pubkeys or fewer than 3 relays.
